commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Tears. Protestants, "Baca. "Marginal note, "of mulberry-trees "near Jerusalem, Judges ii. 5., and 1 Kings v. 23. (Haydock)
It was perhaps used proverbially for any dry place. The Lord had promised to relieve the captives with water, Isaias xxxv. 5. (Calmet)
Place. The temple or tabernacle, (Haydock) which the Lord hath appointed. (Calmet)
